name: Aa-cheitap
description: Vowel modifier added to the right of a consonant, producing the /aː/ sound.

name: I-cheitap
description: Vowel modifier added above a consonant, producing the /i/ sound.

name: U-cheitap
description: Vowel modifier added below a consonant, producing the /u/ sound.

name: E-cheitap
description: Vowel modifier added above a consonant, producing the /e/ sound.

name: O-cheitap
description: Vowel modifier added to the top and right, producing the /o/ sound.

name: Ei-cheitap
description: Vowel modifier added above a consonant, producing the /ei/ diphthong.

name: Ou-cheitap
description: Vowel modifier added to the right, producing the /ou/ diphthong.

name: Nung
description: Nasalization dot (anusvara) placed above a letter, representing nasal sound.
